sql: SELECT strategy_id AS s, exit_ts AS t, entry_delay_sec AS lag, ROUND(gross_pct,3) AS g, size_sol AS sz, ROUND(net_sol,5) AS net, scaled_out AS sc, substr(mint,1,10) AS mint, substr(lead_wallet,1,10) AS lead FROM copy_trades WHERE status='closed' AND net_sol IS NOT NULL AND strategy_id IN ('copy-hotlead-strict','copy-hotlead-strict-hi','copy-fable-leadcap') ORDER BY exit_ts ASC, id ASC
